'''M-HYD 6804''', nicknamed '''Dowser''', was a [[Mini-Huvicko/Yuzabi Dowser binary hydromech droid]] brought to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the ''[[Lucky Despot]]''. The Despot's captain marketed the droids to moisture prospectors of the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]], but the droids proved ill-suited to the terrain and were frequently caught and broken open by [[Tusken/Legends|Tusken]] Raiders. Extensive buyer remorse led to the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Prospector's Riot]]. Dowser was abandoned by its owner and scavenged by [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit]] the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] and his [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]]. When [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtroopers]] raided the sandcrawler, M-HYD was presumed either destroyed or taken for use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Personality and traits==
Considered pretentious, M-HYD 6804 specialized in working with [[Binary loadlifter/Legends|binary load lifters]] and [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]]. Although it was proficient in a number of languages, it preferred to converse only in [[Binary/Legends|Binary]].<ref name="CCG A New Hope">{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=M-HYD "Binary" Droid}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:M-HYD_6804-Classic_Star_Wars.jpg|250px|thumb|The droid on Tatooine]]
The backstory of this droid model was developed through [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace's]] ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature by Hyperspace member ''caledre''.
